Title: Verify empty cart page displays the correct message
Preconditions: 1) Cart is empty.\n2) User on the cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Navigate to /cart or click Cart icon.\n2) Observe the cart page content and empty-cart message.
ExpectedResult: Empty cart page shows sad face/icon and message indicating cart is empty (e.g., 'Your cart is currently empty.'), and provides a link to continue shopping. No product rows are shown.

Title: Verify cart icon shows zero items when the cart is empty
Preconditions: 1) User has no items in cart.\n2) User on any site page.
TestSteps: 1) Observe the cart icon (header).\n2) Verify item count displayed on the icon.
ExpectedResult: Cart icon displays '0' or no badge when the cart is empty; accessible label reads 'Cart, 0 items'.

Title: Verify simple product can be added to the cart from the product detail page
Preconditions: 1) Simple product exists and is in stock.\n2) User on product detail page.
TestSteps: 1) Click Add to cart.\n2) Observe cart icon and confirmation message.\n3) Open cart page and verify product present.
ExpectedResult: Product is added to the cart. Cart icon increments and a confirmation (toast/notice) appears. Cart page lists product with correct name, price and quantity.
ActualResult: Simple product is successfully added to the cart from the product detail page and a confirmation message appears.

Title: Verify simple product can be added to the cart from the shop page
Preconditions: 1) Simple product visible on shop page and is in stock.\n2) User on shop page.
TestSteps: 1) Click Add to cart button under a simple product.\n2) Observe cart icon and notification.\n3) Open cart page to validate item.
ExpectedResult: Product is added to the cart and cart icon updates. Cart page shows the product with correct details.
ActualResult: Simple product is successfully added to the cart from the shop page and cart count updates.

Title: Verify adding a variable product to the cart displays the selected variant details
Preconditions: 1) Variable product exists with colour/size variants.\n2) User on variable product page.
TestSteps: 1) Select a colour and size.\n2) Click Add to cart.\n3) Go to cart and verify variant details.
TestData: Color: any available option\nSize: any available option
ExpectedResult: Cart line shows product name with selected variant (e.g., T-Shirt - Blue / M), correct SKU if available, and correct price for the variant.
ActualResult: Variable product is added to the cart with the selected variant details

Title: Verify multiple different products can be added to the cart
Preconditions: 1) Multiple products available in shop.\n2) User on shop page.
TestSteps: 1) Add Product A to cart.\n2) Return to shop and add Product B.\n3) Navigate to cart and verify both products listed with correct quantities.
ExpectedResult: All added products appear in the cart with correct details and quantities. Cart totals reflect combined prices.
ActualResult: Multiple different products are successfully added to the cart and all items are displayed in cart.

Title: Verify sale product is added to the cart at the discounted price
Preconditions: 1) Sale product configured with discounted price exists.\n2) User on sale product page.
TestSteps: 1) Click Add to cart on sale product.\n2) Navigate to cart and observe price displayed.
ExpectedResult: Product is added at the discounted price; cart displays both original and discounted price per system design. Order/checkout reflects discounted price.
ActualResult: Sale product is added to the cart at the discounted price

Title: Verify cart page displays all correct product details
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one product.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Open cart page.\n2) Observe product image, name (link), price, quantity control, subtotal, and remove icon.
ExpectedResult: Cart lists product image, product name as link to product page, price (original/sale), short description (if configured), quantity control and delete icon. Subtotals and totals calculate correctly.
ActualResult: Cart page displays correct product details

Title: Verify cart totals section displays correctly
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one item.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Observe Cart Totals section.\n2) Check coupon input, shipping estimation and estimated total.
ExpectedResult: Cart Totals displays coupon code field (expandable), shipping options (FREE if applicable), subtotal, and estimated total matching product totals and applied discounts.
ActualResult: Cart Totals section displays subtotals and estimated total correctly

Title: Verify breadcrumb on the cart page displays correctly
Preconditions: 1) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Observe breadcrumb at top of cart page and click links to navigate.
ExpectedResult: Breadcrumb displays correctly (Home > Cart) and links navigate to expected pages. Current page is not a link.

Title: Verify cart items persist after browser refresh
Preconditions: 1) User has at least one item in cart.\n2) Items in cart are stored in session/cookie or user account.
TestSteps:
1) Add product(s) to cart.
2) Note items and quantities.
3) Refresh browser.
4) Re-open cart and verify items.
ExpectedResult: Cart items and quantities remain unchanged after page refresh for the same session/user.
ActualResult: Cart contents remain intact after refreshing the browser page.

Title: Verify clicking the plus button increases the product quantity by one
Preconditions: 1) Product in cart with quantity 1.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click plus (+) on quantity control.\n2) Observe updated quantity and subtotal.
ExpectedResult: Quantity increases by one and line subtotal and cart totals update accordingly.
ActualResult: Clicking the plus (+) button increases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.

Title: Verify clicking the minus button decreases the product quantity by one
Preconditions: 1) Product in cart with quantity >=2.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click minus (-) on quantity control.\n2) Observe updated quantity and subtotal.
ExpectedResult: Quantity decreases by one and totals update accordingly. If quantity reaches 0 and system behavior is to remove item, item is removed.
ActualResult: Clicking the minus (-) button decreases the product quantity by one and updates the subtotal.

Title: Verify updating the quantity to three updates the total correctly
Preconditions: 1) Product in cart with quantity 1.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Increase quantity to 3 (click plus or edit field).\n2) Observe line subtotal and cart totals.
ExpectedResult: Updating quantity to 3 recalculates line subtotal and cart totals correctly (3x unit price plus applicable taxes/shipping).
ActualResult: Updating the quantity to three recalculates the subtotal and cart total correctly.

Title: Verify minus button does not reduce quantity below one
Preconditions: 1) Product in cart with quantity 1.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click minus when quantity is 1.\n2) Observe result.
ExpectedResult: Quantity cannot be reduced below one using minus button; UI either keeps quantity at 1 or prompts for removal via delete icon.
ActualResult: Quantity cannot be reduced below one using the minus (-) button.

Title: Verify entering zero in the quantity field removes the product from the cart
Preconditions: 1) Product in cart with quantity >=1.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps:
1) Click quantity field.
2) Clear value and type 0.
3) Press Enter or click outside.
4) Observe the cart.
ExpectedResult: Entering 0 removes the product from the cart and updates cart totals accordingly. A message may confirm item removal.
ActualResult: The product was not removed when 0 was entered (regression observed)

Title: Verify clicking the delete icon removes the product from the cart
Preconditions: 1) Product present in cart.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click delete/remove (bin) icon next to product.\n2) Observe cart contents and totals.
ExpectedResult: Item is removed from cart and cart totals update. Cart icon count decrements.
ActualResult: Clicking the delete/remove icon successfully removes the product from the cart.

Title: Verify cart icon updates correctly after a product is removed
Preconditions: 1) Cart has one or more items.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Remove an item using delete icon.\n2) Observe cart icon count in header.
ExpectedResult: Cart icon count decreases appropriately after a product is removed from the cart.
ActualResult: Cart icon count decreases appropriately after a product is removed from the cart.

Title: Verify Add coupons section is expandable on the cart page
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one item.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click Add coupons dropdown in Cart Totals.\n2) Observe if coupon input expands.
ExpectedResult: Add coupons section expands to reveal coupon input field and apply button.
ActualResult: Add Coupon section expands successfully and displays the coupon code input field.

Title: Verify applying a valid coupon code updates the cart total
Preconditions: 1) Valid coupon exists.\n2) Cart has at least one item.
TestSteps: 1) Expand coupons section.\n2) Enter valid coupon code and click Apply.\n3) Observe cart totals.
ExpectedResult: Coupon is applied; discount reflected in cart totals and Estimated total updates accordingly.
ActualResult: Valid coupon code is applied successfully and cart total updated.

Title: Verify applying an invalid coupon code shows an error message
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one item.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Expand coupons section.\n2) Enter invalid coupon code and click Apply.\n3) Observe error message.
ExpectedResult: Error message indicates coupon code not valid and no discount applied.
ActualResult: Invalid coupon code displays appropriate error and no discount applied.

Title: Verify free shipping is displayed as FREE in the cart totals
Preconditions: 1) Cart meets free shipping threshold or free shipping configured.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Navigate to cart page.\n2) Observe shipping line in Cart Totals.
ExpectedResult: Free shipping displays 'FREE' in Cart Totals section when eligible. Otherwise shipping estimate shows cost or 'Calculate shipping'.
ActualResult: Free shipping is displayed as FREE in the Cart Totals section.

Title: Verify clicking Proceed to Checkout navigates to the checkout page
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one item.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click Proceed to Checkout button.\n2) Observe navigation and checkout page elements.
ExpectedResult: User is navigated to checkout page. Checkout fields load and page URL reflects checkout route.
ActualResult: Clicking Proceed to Checkout navigates the user to the Checkout page successfully.

Title: Verify clicking the product name link in the cart navigates to product detail page
Preconditions: 1) Cart has at least one item.\n2) User on cart page.
TestSteps: 1) Click product name link in cart.\n2) Observe navigation to product detail page.
ExpectedResult: Clicking the product name navigates to the corresponding product detail page for that item.
ActualResult: Clicking the product name link in the cart navigates to the corresponding product detail page.

Title: Verify navigating to checkout with empty cart does not allow checkout to proceed
Preconditions: 1) Cart is empty.\n2) User attempts to navigate to checkout.
TestSteps: 1) Ensure cart is empty.\n2) Navigate directly to checkout URL.\n3) Observe behavior.
ExpectedResult: User is redirected to cart or shown message preventing checkout when cart is empty; checkout cannot proceed without items.
